info.title: HarMockServer
info.description: HAR mock server provides the ability to mock API requests using HAR files. This can be useful for testing or reproduction of reported bugs where a HAR file has been captured in the browser.

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription:
HAR mock server provides the ability to mock API requests using HAR files. This can be useful for
            testing or reproduction of reported bugs where a HAR file has been captured in the browser.

arguments.name: args
arguments.description: Optional arguments passed to ASP.NET Configuration default host. See https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/aspnet/core/fundamentals/configuration/#command-line-arguments
